Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process is about invoice approval

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: From interviews Mary says Invoice arrives by email Check if associated with valid PO number If no PO send back to supplier If has PO log it forward to purchasing confirm receipt match invoice to PO send to manager for approval resolve discrepancies and then schedule payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Dan says Purchasing receives invoice from AP checks invoice details against PO and receipt compares quantities prices and delivery charges if something is off contacts supplier directly or asks AP to hold until corrected if everything is correct sends confirmation back to AP

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Carlos says after PO match and purchasing confirmation he gets a notification reviews invoice PO and confirmation approves if all looks good otherwise rejects or asks Mary to hold and investigate after approval AP schedules payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Rita says she handles exceptions when Mary cannot match the invoice or Purchasing has unresolved issues she contacts suppliers coordinates between departments may create a retrospective PO or reject and after resolution the invoice returns to purchasing confirmation manager approval and payment scheduling

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Karen says she is involved indirectly when invoice terms do not match she helps obtain missing PO information or resolve pricing discrepancies by contacting suppliers and checking contracts

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to model the process Invoice arrives then validate PO presence if no PO request missing details and loop until a revised invoice arrives if PO exists continue with logging and purchasing review

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: There is a recurring exception pattern around missing PO pricing discrepancy missing items supplier correction invoice hold escalation to supervisor and then return to the normal flow

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Possible interpretation is that Purchasing confirms receipt of goods and consistency with the PO and AP then performs a system based match after that confirmation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: There may be two layers of checking one by Purchasing for receipt and commercial correctness and one by AP for system matching and final preparation before manager approval

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Mary says manager approval is triggered after receipt confirmation and invoice match Dan assumes after his confirmation it moves to manager and Carlos confirms he receives the invoice after matching and purchasing confirmation so these accounts align

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: To simplify the BPMN like model represent discrepancy handling as a resolution loop that can involve Purchasing AP Supervisor Supplier Relationship Manager and Supplier until the invoice is corrected or rejected

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Roles are Accounts Payable Clerk Purchasing Officer Department Manager Accounts Payable Supervisor Supplier Relationship Manager and Supplier with the accounting system used for logging matching notifications and payment scheduling

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Artifacts include invoice purchase order confirmation email system record and manager notification

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Main sequence is Start invoice received Check PO present If no request missing PO from supplier and loop If yes log invoice in system forward to Purchasing verify against PO and receipt resolve discrepancies if needed send confirmation to AP match invoice in system send to manager review and approve if approved schedule for payment End

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: If the invoice has no PO and no retrospective PO can be created then the exception path can end in rejection rather than returning to the normal flow

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Manager rejection or hold leads to investigation by AP and possibly others and then resubmission for approval or cancellation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The final structured output should therefore include tasks sequence gateways roles artifacts and exception loops with uncertainty noted where supplier correction or supervisor intervention can vary
